data.title: About Us
data.content:
This site is built with **@webhouse/cms** — an AI-native CMS engine.

## Features

- Schema-driven content
- Static site generation

- This was added by an AI
- This was added by me, and it also saves or what?

_seo.metaDescription: Learn about @webhouse/cms, an AI-native CMS engine featuring schema-driven content, static site generation, and intelligent content creation capabilities.
